description: You are logged into the wger fitness manager at http://localhost as the admin user (username: admin, password: adminadmin). Create a new custom exercise named 'Sled Push' in the 'Legs' category. The exercise description should be: 'Push a weighted sled across a flat surface. Drive through your legs while keeping your body at a 45-degree angle.' Assign 'Gluteus maximus' as the primary muscle and 'Gastrocnemius' as the secondary muscle.
